description: Tenuring promotion of a rope/dependent-string whose base pointer also needed promotion left the dependent string holding the un-promoted (old, nursery) base pointer, while the GC's post-barrier list had already been emptied → next minor GC walked the dependent string, computed the (asBits_ & CellAlignMask) of the freed nursery cell and hit the Cell.h:109 reserved-mask assertion (UAF surface). Fix: always update to promoted root base string and post-barrier (git 0f4762548281 r=jonco, multi-file: gc/Tenuring.cpp, gc/Nursery.h, vm/StringType.cpp).
